title: woodsia polystichoides
intro: Woodsia polystichoides, also known as the cliff fern or Woodsia fern, is a species of fern that is native to North America, typically found growing on rocky outcrops and cliffs. The medicinal properties of Woodsia polystichoides include its use as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Woodsia polystichoides can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
